ariaSpec.usage: The focusable element should have role combobox (input with popup).
The component needs an accessible name including the currently selected value.
Indicates the component has a Dialog Popup.
Announces the visibility state of the popup.
Rendered only when the picker is disabled.
Rendered only when the picker is disabled.
The inner ColorGradient must be removed from the page tab sequence.

kbSpec.behavior: Closes Popup and moves focus back to k-colorpicker element.
Navigates to the next focusable element in the Popup. If current focus is on the last element, moves focus to the first focusable item in the Popup.
Navigates to the previous focusable element in the Popup. If current focus is on the first element, moves focus to the last focusable item in the Popup.
For button items, executes the currently focused button action.
If any of the colorgradient elements are currently focused, bring focus back to the k-colorpicker element.
